configurePresets.name: full
configurePresets.displayName: full -- window + app + ui/fx + text + image (ADR-0015 phase A0)
configurePresets.description: Default composition: every module glintfx has today, including the standalone GLFW-backed App facade. Equivalent to the plain 'cmake -S glintfx -B <dir>' invocation this repo's CI already uses (GLINTFX_BACKEND_GLFW defaults ON) -- this preset just names it. ADR-0015 (d)(5) 'named compositions'.

configurePresets.name: embed-only
configurePresets.displayName: embed-only -- no window/app module (ADR-0015 phase A0)
configurePresets.description: GLINTFX_MODULE_WINDOW=OFF: no GLFW dependency in the link line, no standalone App facade compiled. This is the composition GusWorld (the only real consumer today) actually ships -- Engine + UiLayer + RenderGl3 + Bootstrap + SystemClock (+ the fx decorators, still fused with ui per ADR-0015 (c)), embedded into a host that already owns the window/GL context. Equivalent to this repo's existing '-DGLINTFX_BACKEND_GLFW=OFF' CI leg -- this preset just names it under the new ADR-0015 flag. ADR-0015 (d)(5) 'named compositions'.
